2026-04-30.editor: OK I just found out that my brother is dying, and it's going to be quick. It's hard to work my way around all of the shit that's going through my head right now. It's hard to get outside of MYSELF and just figure out the best way to be the kind and caring person for others that I know I can be.
2026-04-30.grat2: grateful for everything Gary did to make me feel loved and part of his family, to make me feel like I was a normal everyday kid, not some weirdo from the woods
2026-04-30.grat3: Dave and his endless caring for me!!!!
2026-04-30.tmrw3: Finish Jason's renderings and get drawings to Joel
